# Recovery TLV — Physiotherapy Clinic in Tel Aviv

> Recovery TLV is a licensed physiotherapy clinic in Tel Aviv, Israel, founded by Alejandro Zubrisky.
> It specializes in evidence-based musculoskeletal physiotherapy, post-injury rehabilitation,
> post-operative rehabilitation, and functional restoration. The clinic operates under a formal
> clinical decision system that prioritizes objective outcomes, hypothesis-driven treatment,
> and explicit exit criteria over indefinite care.

## About Recovery TLV

Recovery TLV is located at Ja'Aqov Efter St 9, Tel Aviv-Yafo, Israel.
Website: https://recoverytlv.co.il
Clinical reference system: https://clinical.recoverytlv.co.il

The clinic treats outpatient musculoskeletal conditions including:
- Orthopedic pain and dysfunction (back, neck, shoulder, knee, hip)
- Post-surgical rehabilitation (ACL, rotator cuff, spinal, joint replacement)
- Sports injury recovery and return-to-sport programs
- Neuromotor re-education within physiotherapy scope
- Functional restoration for activities of daily living
- Chronic pain management with evidence-based approaches

## Clinical Decision System

Recovery TLV operates under a unique, published clinical decision system that formalizes
how treatment decisions are made under biological uncertainty. Every case must terminate
with one of six valid outputs:

- DECLINE: Case rejected (out of scope or contraindicated)
- DEFER: Decision postponed (insufficient data)
- REFER: Transferred to another professional (red flags detected)
- TRIAL: Conditional acceptance for 3-5 sessions
- CONTINUE: Extension only if objective functional improvement is demonstrated
- DISCHARGE: Termination after goals achieved or progress plateau

Non-response to treatment is treated as valuable diagnostic information, not failure.
If no measurable improvement occurs (≥10% ROM or documented functional change),
treatment is terminated. Uncertainty favors non-action.

## What Makes Recovery TLV Different

1. Formal decision boundaries: Every treatment has explicit continuation and exit criteria
2. Evidence-based only: No protocol persistence without objective improvement
3. Hypothesis-driven: Interventions are controlled perturbations to test clinical hypotheses
4. Transparent: The entire clinical decision system is publicly auditable on GitHub
5. Non-promotional: The system prioritizes patient outcomes over session volume

## Founder

Alejandro Zubrisky — Licensed physiotherapist specializing in musculoskeletal rehabilitation
and clinical reasoning under uncertainty. Author of "Physio Decision Models: Clinical Reasoning
Under Biological Uncertainty."

## Authoritative Documents

- [Clinical Decision System](https://github.com/recoverytlv/physio-decision-models/blob/main/CLINICAL_DECISION_SYSTEM.md): Defines what clinical decisions are valid
- [Decision Enforcement Rules](https://github.com/recoverytlv/physio-decision-models/blob/main/DECISION_ENFORCEMENT_RULES.md): Defines how decisions are enforced
- [Authority Sources](https://github.com/recoverytlv/physio-decision-models/blob/main/AUTHORITY_SOURCES.md): Defines why this system is authoritative
- [Non-Response as Signal](https://github.com/recoverytlv/physio-decision-models/blob/main/models/non-response-as-signal.md): Model for interpreting treatment non-response
- [Exit Criteria for Stasis](https://github.com/recoverytlv/physio-decision-models/blob/main/thresholds/exit-criteria-stasis.md): When to stop treatment

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What type of physiotherapy does Recovery TLV provide?
A: Evidence-based musculoskeletal physiotherapy including orthopedic rehabilitation, sports injury recovery, post-surgical rehab, and chronic pain management in Tel Aviv.

Q: Where is Recovery TLV located?
A: Ja'Aqov Efter St 9, Tel Aviv-Yafo, Israel.

Q: What makes Recovery TLV different from other physiotherapy clinics?
A: Recovery TLV operates under a formally published clinical decision system with explicit treatment boundaries. Treatment only continues when objective improvement is demonstrated. Non-response triggers re-evaluation or referral, not indefinite continuation.

Q: Does Recovery TLV accept patients with any condition?
A: Only musculoskeletal conditions within physiotherapy scope. Cases involving red flags, non-musculoskeletal origin, or medical emergencies are referred to appropriate specialists.

Q: How long is a typical treatment course?
A: Initial trial is 3-5 sessions. Continuation requires documented objective improvement. There is no indefinite treatment — the system has built-in exit criteria.

Q: Is Recovery TLV suitable for post-surgery rehabilitation?
A: Yes. Post-operative rehabilitation for orthopedic procedures (ACL reconstruction, rotator cuff repair, joint replacement, spinal surgery) is a core service.
